task_objective: Rename the post-operation refresh failure warning so restore-triggered refresh failures are not described as post-backup failures, then publish a development prerelease.
tests_added: Updated test_post_operation_refresh_failure_logs_warning_and_returns_backup_result to assert the neutral warning text
design_decisions: Kept the existing broad exception boundary and warning severity/category unchanged; only the user-visible message changed from post-backup to post-operation.
results: Focused red-green validation passed. Full validation and dev release dispatch are handled after this session log.
